SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AcceptedState
JPA entity representing the accepted-state/status associated with an IssueReport.
AcceptedStateDescriptionUpdateRequest
Request body DTO for updating an AcceptedState description.
AcceptedStateNotFoundException
Exception thrown when an AcceptedState resource cannot be located.
AcceptedStateRepository
Spring Data repository for AcceptedState persistence operations.
AcceptedStateService
Service providing CRUD-style operations for AcceptedState entities.
AcceptedStateServiceImpl
Default AcceptedStateService implementation backed by AcceptedStateRepository.
AccessDeniedException
Exception thrown when a user attempts to access a resource they don't have permission for.
ApplicationHomeConfiguration
Spring configuration providing an ApplicationHome rooted at the server application class location.
BadRequestException
Exception thrown when a request contains invalid data or parameters.
ConflictException
Exception thrown when an operation conflicts with existing data (e.g., duplicates, deleting in-use resources).
DuplicateAcceptedStateException
Exception thrown when attempting to create an AcceptedState with a duplicate status tag.
DuplicateIssueTypeException
Exception thrown when attempting to create an IssueType with a duplicate tag.
DuplicateUserException
Exception thrown when attempting to create a user that already exists.
GlobalExceptionHandler
Global exception handler for REST controllers.
GlobalExceptionHandler.ErrorResponse
Simple response payload for error messages returned by this handler.
ImageNotFoundException
Exception thrown when a requested report image cannot be located.
InvalidImageException
Exception thrown when an uploaded image is invalid or cannot be processed.
InvalidIssueReportException
Exception thrown when an issue report request is invalid.
InvalidIssueTypeException
Exception thrown when an issue type request is invalid.
InvalidStateException
Exception thrown when an accepted-state/status transition request is invalid.
InvalidUserException
Exception thrown when user data is invalid.
IssueReport
JPA entity representing a user-submitted issue report, including location, status, and images.
IssueReportController
REST controller exposing issue report operations for authenticated users.
IssueReportDto
API DTO representing an issue report, including flattened location/status information and image DTOs.
IssueReportNotFoundException
Exception thrown when an IssueReport resource cannot be located.
IssueReportRepository
Spring Data repository for IssueReport persistence operations.
IssueReportRequest
Request body DTO for creating or updating an issue report.
IssueReportService
Service providing operations for creating, retrieving, updating, and administering IssueReport entities.
IssueReportServiceImpl
Default IssueReportService implementation providing report CRUD and administrative updates.
IssueReportStatusUpdateRequest
Request body DTO for updating the accepted-state of an issue report.
IssueReportSummary
Summary DTO exposing a subset of IssueReport fields for list views.
IssueReportTypesUpdateRequest
Request body DTO for replacing the issue types associated with an issue report.
IssueType
JPA entity representing a category/tag that can be associated with an IssueReport.
IssueTypeController
REST controller exposing read-only access to issue types.
IssueTypeNotFoundException
Exception thrown when an IssueType resource cannot be located.
IssueTypeRepository
Spring Data repository for IssueType persistence operations.
IssueTypeService
Service providing CRUD-style operations for IssueType entities.
IssueTypeServiceImpl
Default IssueTypeService implementation backed by IssueTypeRepository.
JwtConverter
Converts an authenticated Jwt into a Spring Security UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken populated with a UserProfile principal.
LocalFileSystemStorageService
StorageService implementation that stores content on the local file system.
ManagerAcceptedStateController
REST controller exposing manager-only accepted-state administration endpoints.
ManagerIssueReportController
REST controller for manager-only issue report administration operations.
ManagerIssueReportResponse
Response DTO for GET /manager/issue-reports.
ManagerIssueReportResponse.AcceptedStateResponse
Nested DTO exposing a subset of AcceptedState fields for manager views.
ManagerIssueReportResponse.IssueTypeResponse
Nested DTO exposing a subset of IssueType fields for manager views.
ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportImageResponse
Nested DTO exposing a subset of ReportImage fields for manager views.
ManagerIssueReportResponse.ReportLocationResponse
Nested DTO exposing a subset of ReportLocation fields for manager views.
ManagerIssueReportResponse.UserProfileResponse
Nested DTO exposing a subset of UserProfile fields for manager views.
ManagerIssueTypeController
REST controller exposing manager-only issue type administration endpoints.
ManagerStatusUpdateRequest
Request body DTO for updating manager status of a user.
ManagerUserController
REST controller for manager-only user administration operations.
ReportImage
JPA entity representing an image associated with an IssueReport.
ReportImageController
REST controller for managing report images.
ReportImageDto
API DTO representing an image attached to an issue report.
ReportImageRepository
Spring Data repository for ReportImage persistence operations.
ReportImageService
Service interface for report image business logic operations.
ReportImageServiceImpl
Implementation of ReportImageService for managing report images.
ReportLocation
JPA entity representing the location associated with an IssueReport.
ReportLocationRepository
Spring Data repository for ReportLocation persistence operations.
ResourceNotFoundException
Exception thrown when a requested resource is not found.
SecurityConfiguration
Spring Security configuration for the service profile.
SeeSomethingAbqApplication
Spring Boot application entry point for the SeeSomethingABQ server.
StorageConfiguration
Configuration properties for server-side file storage.
StorageConfiguration.FilenameProperties
Nested configuration group for filename generation/parsing.
StorageConfiguration.FilenameProperties.TimestampProperties
Nested configuration group for timestamp formatting.
StorageService
Service for storing, retrieving, and deleting binary content by key.
StorageService.StorageReference
Container for content retrieved from storage.
UpdateAvatarRequest
Data transfer object for updating a user's avatar URL.
UpdateDisplayNameRequest
Data transfer object for updating a user's display name.
UpdateEmailRequest
Data transfer object for updating a user's email address.
UpdateUserRequest
Data transfer object for updating user profile information.
UriAttributeConverter
Persists URI values as String (VARCHAR) columns instead of relying on default Java-serialization-based mapping (which commonly results in VARBINARY/BLOB types).
UserController
REST controller for user profile operations.
UserEnabledFilter
Enforces UserProfile.getUserEnabled() for authenticated requests.
UserEnabledUpdateRequest
Request body DTO for updating enabled/disabled status of a user.
UserNotFoundException
Exception thrown when a requested user is not found.
UserProfile
JPA entity representing a user profile backed by an OAuth subject key.
UserProfileRepository
Repository interface for UserProfile entity persistence operations.
UserProfileResponse
DTO representing a user profile response enriched with the total number of reports owned by the user.
UserService
Service interface for user profile business logic operations.
UserServiceImpl
Implementation of UserService providing business logic for user profile operations.
